document_info.document_type: SOV / Schedule of Values with Modifications Log

business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate ownership and operation including office, retail, and mixed-use properties

coverages_discussed.notes: Aggregate building value across 8 locations per current SOV. Prior year aggregate building value was 199124688.
Aggregate contents value across 8 locations per current SOV. Prior year aggregate contents value was 29928511.
Aggregate BI value across 8 locations per current SOV.
Aggregate TIV across 8 locations per current SOV. Prior year aggregate TIV was 229053199.

positives: All 8 locations have sprinkler systems installed
Construction classes are predominantly Fire Resistive and Masonry Non-Combustible
Portfolio is geographically concentrated in major Texas metros (Dallas, Houston, Plano, Fort Worth, Southlake) with strong market fundamentals
Mix of modern buildings; several built post-2000 with newer construction standards
Diverse occupancy mix including office, mercantile, and mixed-use
concerns: Significant TIV increase year-over-year: prior year aggregate TIV was approximately 229053199 vs. current 314784000, representing a ~37.4% increase
LOC-006 Energy Corridor Business Center built in 1995 is the oldest property in the portfolio
Pending addition of a new warehouse facility (effective 2026-03-15) introduces a new occupancy/construction risk not yet detailed in the SOV
A location deletion is noted (lease expired) which may indicate portfolio instability or tenant concentration risk
TIV update per appraisal for Lone Star Property Holdings, LP suggests prior values may have been underinsured
LOC-001 Preston Center Tower carries the largest single-location TIV at 86450000, representing significant concentration risk
Houston locations (LOC-002, LOC-003, LOC-006) carry combined TIV of 114408000 with exposure to hurricane and flood risk

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Portfolio consists of 8 commercial properties across Texas including fire resistive office towers, masonry non-combustible retail centers, and mixed-use developments. Properties range from 52000 to 285000 square feet, built between 1995 and 2018, spanning 2 to 18 stories. All locations are 100% sprinklered. Modifications include addition of a new warehouse facility, deletion of a closed location, and a TIV update per appraisal, all effective 2026-03-15.
